focal_points: Headline text 'The Most Powerful AI Second Brain Setup' (upper right)
composition.visual_hierarchy: The viewer's eye is drawn first to the subject's face due to direct gaze and human element, then moves to the prominent headline text, and finally to the application icons.
composition.balance: asymmetric - the visual weight of the portrait on the left is balanced by the graphic elements (text and icons) on the right.

color_profile.color_palette: analogous (grays, browns) with complementary accents (purple, orange, blue)
color_profile.temperature: neutral - with warm accents from orange and cool accents from blue/purple
color_profile.saturation: moderate - icons are highly saturated, portrait is moderately saturated
color_profile.contrast: high contrast - between text and background, and within the subject's features

shadows.placement: under the chin, on the subject's right side of the face (viewer's right), and subtle shadows in hair

highlights.placement: on forehead, nose bridge, cheekbones, and hair strands

lighting.ambient_fill: present - reducing deep shadows on the subject's right side

technical_specs.texture: smooth - on skin and graphic elements, slightly textured on hair
technical_specs.sharpness: tack sharp - on the subject's face, especially the eyes, and on the graphic elements
technical_specs.depth_of_field: shallow - isolating the subject from the slightly blurred background

typography.placement: overlay - prominently placed in the upper right quadrant of the image
typography.integration: dominant - the text is a primary element conveying the image's message

subject_analysis.primary_subject: A young adult male with brown, wavy hair and blue eyes, wearing a dark hooded garment.
subject_analysis.positioning: left - occupying approximately the left half of the frame
subject_analysis.interaction: isolated - the subject is visually separated from the background, but interacts with the graphic elements by being part of the overall composition

facial_expression.eyes: direct gaze - looking straight at the viewer, relaxed

hair.natural_imperfections: flyaways, natural growth patterns, slight frizz
hair.styling: lightly styled - appears blow-dried for volume, natural movement
hair.styling_detail: lightly styled, no heavy product visible, natural movement
hair.part: deep side - on the subject's right side (viewer's left)
hair.volume: moderate volume - especially on top and sides
hair.details: hair sweeps across the forehead from the deep side part, some face-framing layers

body_positioning.angle: facing camera - slightly turned to the viewer's left

background.setting_type: indoor - simple room with a plain wall
background.spatial_depth: shallow - the background is slightly out of focus, creating minimal depth
background.objects_catalog: The background consists solely of a plain, light gray wall.

prompts: Close-up portrait of a young man with wavy brown hair and blue eyes, subtle smile, direct gaze, wearing a dark hoodie, lit by soft natural light from the front-left, against a clean light gray blurred background. Overlay on the right: a dark charcoal gray rounded rectangular tab with the white bold serif text 'The Most Powerful AI Second Brain Setup'. Below, three app icons: a purple crystal (Obsidian), an orange starburst (Readwise), and a black terminal icon, connected by black plus signs. Clean, modern aesthetic, YouTube thumbnail style.

Professional headshot of a male subject with a confident expression, shallow depth of field, paired with a graphic design overlay featuring a prominent title and three distinct software logos (Obsidian, Readwise, Terminal) with connecting '+' symbols, all on a light gray background. High contrast, informative visual.
generation_parameters.technical_settings: Digital photography, 50mm lens, f/2.8 aperture, ISO 100, 1/160s shutter speed, softbox lighting from front-left. Graphic elements rendered in vector for sharpness.
generation_parameters.post_processing: Color correction for natural skin tones, subtle sharpening on subject's eyes, background cleanup, integration of graphic overlay with subtle drop shadows for depth.
